commands.title: libredash admin backup
commands.summary: Create a consistent LibreDash instance backup
commands.description: Create a consistent LibreDash instance backup

options.name: database-only
options.description: backup only the platform SQLite database

commands.title: libredash admin bootstrap
commands.summary: Bootstrap an owner principal and API token
commands.description: Bootstrap an owner principal and API token

options.name: archived-agent-days
options.description: archived agent conversation retention in days; 0 disables archived conversation pruning

options.name: audit-days
options.description: audit event retention in days; 0 disables audit pruning

options.name: auth-state-days
options.description: expired or revoked auth state retention in days; 0 disables auth-state pruning

options.name: query-days
options.description: query event retention in days; 0 disables query pruning

commands.title: libredash admin restore
commands.summary: Restore LibreDash from a validated instance backup
commands.description: Restore LibreDash from a validated instance backup

options.name: confirm
options.description: confirm replacement of the configured LibreDash instance

options.name: current-out
options.description: path for a backup of the current instance before replacement

options.name: database-only
options.description: restore only the platform SQLite database

commands.title: libredash admin storage cleanup
commands.summary: Reconcile serving-state snapshots and clean DuckLake storage
commands.description: Reconcile serving-state snapshots and clean DuckLake storage

options.name: apply
options.description: perform destructive cleanup instead of dry-run

commands.title: libredash agent ask
commands.summary: Ask the LibreDash read-only agent a question
commands.description: Ask the LibreDash read-only agent a question

commands.title: libredash api
commands.summary: Call any generated LibreDash API operation
commands.description: Call any generated LibreDash API operation

options.name: production
options.description: validate production requirements even when LIBREDASH_PRODUCTION is unset

commands.title: libredash data plan
commands.summary: Plan a local managed data revision
commands.description: Plan a local managed data revision

commands.title: libredash data revisions current
commands.summary: Print the active managed data revision
commands.description: Print the active managed data revision

options.name: auto-approve
options.description: approve and activate the deployment without prompting

commands.title: libredash healthcheck
commands.summary: Check the local LibreDash readiness endpoint
commands.description: Check the local LibreDash readiness endpoint

commands.title: libredash login
commands.summary: Store a LibreDash API token for a target
commands.description: Store a LibreDash API token for a target

options.name: target
options.description: LibreDash server URL for active deployment diff

options.name: type
options.description: result type filter; repeatable or comma-separated

commands.title: libredash semantic-models explain-preview
commands.summary: Explain a semantic model dataset row preview
commands.description: Explain a semantic model dataset row preview

commands.title: libredash semantic-models explain-query
commands.summary: Explain a semantic model dataset query
commands.description: Explain a semantic model dataset query

options.name: addr
options.description: listen address; defaults to the configured address

options.name: environment
options.description: serving environment; defaults to prod in production and dev otherwise

options.name: production
options.description: serve active serving state from the platform DB
